zh.lifeSummary: Baroness Mary Whitmore是John whitmore和Cecily or Cecilia de Hallowell的女兒，於1348年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾沃爾維哈普頓。她和Sir John Giffard至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1412年在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安牛頓 維利亞享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Baroness Mary Whitmore是John whitmore和Cecily or Cecilia de Hallowell的女儿，于1348年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾沃爾維哈普頓。她和Sir John Giffard至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1412年在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安牛頓 維利亞享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Whitmore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Whitmoor (Devon) or Whitmore (Staffordshire and Dorset), or from any of numerous other places in England with names denoting a white moor or mere (from Old English hwīt ‘white’ + mōr ‘moor’ or mere ‘pool’).
History: Francis Whitmore settled in Cambridge, MA, before 1648.

variants.name: Whittemore
meanings: History: Thomas Whittemore came from England to Charlestown, MA, in or c. 1639. Amos Whittemore, born in Cambridge, MA, in 1759 was an inventor and gunsmith, and another Thomas Whittemore was born in Boston in 1800; he was a Universalist clergyman and MA legislator.

variants.name: Whitmer
meanings: Americanized form of German   Wittmeyer   or of   Wittmer  .

variants.name: Whitmarsh
meanings: English: habitational name from Whitemarsh, a place in the parish of Sedgehill, Wiltshire, named from Old English hwīt ‘white’ (i.e. ‘phosphorescent’) + mersc ‘marsh’. Compare Whitmore .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: Baroness Mary Whitmore was born in 1348, in Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of John whitmore and Cecily or Cecilia de Hallowell. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Sir John Giffard. She died in 1412, in Newton Village, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

ja.lifeSummary: Baroness Mary Whitmoreは1348年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウオルバーハンプトンでJohn whitmoreとCecily or Cecilia de Hallowellの娘として生まれた。彼女はSir John Giffardとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1412年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンニュートン ヴィラッジで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baroness Mary Whitmore(은)는 1348년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 울버함프턴에서 John whitmore(와)과 Cecily or Cecilia de Hallowell의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir John Giffard(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1412년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 뉴턴 비라지에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Baroness Mary Whitmore родилась в 1348 г. в местности волвирамптон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали John whitmore и Cecily or Cecilia de Hallowell.
